text:
No results were returned for the exact title search. Combined with the automated checker findings — the arXiv ID 2404.02285 actually points to a completely different paper ("LP++: A Surprisingly Strong Linear Probe for Few-Shot CLIP") with entirely different authors — this reference is fabricated.

VERDICT: LIKELY
EXPLANATION: No paper with the exact title "Biotalk: Enzyme function prediction with natural language supervision" was found in any academic database or via web search. The cited arXiv ID (2404.02285) resolves to a completely unrelated paper with different title and authors, and none of the cited authors match the real paper at that ID.
LINK: NONE
